---
title: "SENMAYO AND FRIEDMAN SCORING 5A"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-26"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

df <- data.frame(
  Cell_Type = c(
    "AT1", "AT2", "ALVEOLAR PROLIFERATING",
    "ALVEOLAR FIBROBLASTS", "EC CAPILLARY",
    "MONOCYTES", "GOBLET CELLS", "MAST CELLS"
  ),
  Score = c(0.5, 1.3, 1.0, 1.1, 1.0, -0.35, -0.5, -1.0)
)

df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    Cell_Type = factor(Cell_Type, levels = Cell_Type),
    Color = ifelse(Score >= 0, "Positive", "Negative")
  )
```

```{r}
theme(
  panel.grid = element_blank(),
  panel.border = element_blank(),

  axis.line.x = element_blank(),
  axis.line.y = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.8),
  axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),

  plot.title = element_text(
    hjust = 0.5,
    face = "bold",
    color = "purple",
    size = 16
  ),

  axis.text.x = element_text(
    angle = 270,
    hjust = 1,   # FIXED
    vjust = 0.5,
    face = "bold",
    size = 12,
    color = "black"
  ),

  axis.text.y = element_text(
    face = "bold",
    size = 12,
    color = "black"
  ),

  axis.title.y = element_text(
    face = "bold",
    size = 14,
    color = "black"
  ),

  legend.position = "none"
)
```

```{r}
# create label positions
df$label_y <- ifelse(df$Score > 0, 0, 0.05)

p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = Cell_Type, y = Score, fill = Color)) +

  geom_col(width = 0.75, color = "black") +

  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Positive" = "red", "Negative" = "blue")) +

  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "black", linewidth = 1) +

  # labels placed differently
  geom_text(
    aes(
      x = Cell_Type,
      y = label_y,
      label = Cell_Type
    ),
    angle = 270,
    hjust = ifelse(df$Score > 0, 0, 1),   # THIS FIXES POSITIVE VS NEGATIVE
    vjust = 0.5,
    size = 4.5,
    fontface = "bold",
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +

  labs(
    title = "SenMayo, Friedman, and Cell Age scores assessed across\ncell types during Mature Lung vs Alveolar Maturation\nvs Early Alveolar",
    x = NULL,
    y = "SENSCORE"
  ) +

  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +

  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x = element_blank(),

    plot.title = element_text(
      hjust = 0.5,
      face = "bold",
      color = "purple",
      size = 16
    ),

    axis.text.y = element_text(
      face = "bold",
      size = 12,
      color = "black"
    ),

    axis.title.y = element_text(
      face = "bold",
      size = 14,
      color = "black"
    ),

    legend.position = "none"
  )

p
```
